title: pouteria lenticellata
intro: Pouteria lenticellata, also known as the Guanaban or Soursop tree, is a tropical tree native to Central and South America and the Caribbean. The plant's leaves, bark, and fruit have been used in traditional medicine for their various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pouteria lenticellata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to combat cancer and viral infections. Pouteria lenticellata is typically prepared as a tea, juice, or tincture, with the leaves and bark often being used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
